texto: For me it's always about first impressions. I trust my instincts. I love to prepare if it's something that requires training. But I don't like to prepare the psychology too much. I enjoy the psychology of the character but I work better from a first impression.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Billy Zane: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “For me it's always about first impressions. I trust my instincts. I love to prepare if it's somet…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, love, work pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e trabalho.

frase_original: For me it's always about first impressions. I trust my instincts. I love to prepare if it's something that requires training. But I don't like to prepare the psychology too much. I enjoy the psychology of the character but I work better from a first impression.
